FlexiPage.description: Account page for the sales teams from March 2024

componentInstanceProperties.name: richTextValue
componentInstanceProperties.value: 🔔📢 THERE ARE OPEN OPPORTUNITIES ON THIS ACCOUNT

componentInstanceProperties.name: richTextValue
componentInstanceProperties.value: 🔔📢 THERE ARE CONTRACTS DUE TO EXPIRE WITHIN THE NEXT 12 MONTHS

componentInstanceProperties.name: richTextValue
componentInstanceProperties.value: CONTRACT FILES ARE NOT STORED IN HERE - PLEASE GO TO THE CONTRACT RECORD TO UPLOAD THESE

componentInstanceProperties.name: richTextValue
componentInstanceProperties.value: 🚚 PROPOSITION PROFILES FOR THIS ACCOUNT 🚚

componentInstanceProperties.name: richTextValue
componentInstanceProperties.value:
Check the matched leads and convert them to this account where appropriate or go to the lead record and either select the status 'Unqualified' or delete them

Ensure all your contacts are associated to this account and review the Title & Contact Hierarchy

componentInstanceProperties.name: richTextValue
componentInstanceProperties.value: ⚠️ ACCOUNT IS AT RISK ⚠️
